title: Scenario and Sensitivity Analysis Input
description: Required and optional inputs for executing the Scenario and Sensitivity Analysis skill.

problem_statement.description: The business problem or diagnostic question to be analyzed.

company_context.description: Company background, industry, size, and relevant business context.

base_case_financial.description: Base case financial model with all key assumptions explicitly labeled

identified_set_key.description: Identified set of key value drivers and sensitivity variables (revenue growth rate, EBITDA margin, churn rate, WACC, capex intensity)

range_definitions_each.description: Range definitions for each variable: bear case (pessimistic), base case, and bull case values

target_output_metric.description: Target output metric (NPV, equity value, IRR, EBITDA, free cash flow, or payback period)

probability_weights_each.description: Probability weights for each scenario (bear / base / bull) to support probability-weighted valuation

correlated_variable_pairs.description: Correlated variable pairs where joint movement is economically meaningful (e.g., revenue growth and gross margin)
